zh: 孩子所說的謊是孩子他所希望實現的夢想與願望、
en: The lies children tell are often the dreams and wishes they hope to fulfill,

zh: 而不是隱藏他的不良行為或不好的想法、
en: not attempts to hide bad behavior or bad thoughts.

zh: 例如:有一個孩子對他的同學說、
en: For example, a child said to his classmate,

zh: 昨天我爸媽帶我到動物園去玩、
en: "Yesterday my parents took me to the zoo."
When the father found out his son was lying,

zh: 非常生氣、並責駡了孩子一番、
en: he got very angry and scolded him.

zh: 但卻忽略了孩子很想去動物園的願望。
en: But he overlooked the child's deep wish to visit the zoo.
